response.justification: Strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, open-source background, and Linux familiarity, plus founder experience with GISCollective showing some leadership initiative. However, German proficiency is listed as only 'Basic', which fails the mandatory C1 requirement, and there is no explicit Head of Development or formal team-leadership track record. UML and Python are not evidenced, and architectural leadership is implied rather than demonstrated.
strengths: Extensive polyglot software development experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Active open-source contributor and founder of GISCollective, with Linux/Unix and self-hosted infrastructure experience
Strong engineering practices background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops/talks) indicating mentoring capability
concerns: German listed as 'Basic' — fails the mandatory C1 language requirement
No formal Head of Development, Tech Lead, or people-management role demonstrated
UML modeling and Python proficiency not evidenced in resume

key_factors.factor: Open-source founder and broad senior engineering experience
